options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <object_list> # List of objects on which property is to be appiled (string, required) <property_name> # Name of property (string, required) <property_value> # Value of property

options.name: -object_type
options.description: Type of object on which property is to be defined. Types can be design, port, cell, pin, net, lib, lib_cell, lib_pin

options.name: -quiet
options.description: Specifies to exit quietly without issuing error
